changes.description: Fixed Bash tool interception bug: added WORKFLOW_REQUIRED_PATTERNS_IN_COMMAND without ^ anchors for matching protected directories within command strings. Also fixed logic to return blocked:false when all extracted targets are excluded files.
Added .cjs extension to vitest include pattern so test files with .cjs extension are properly discovered.

verification.bash_sed_interception: PASS - sed -i on protected files without workflow now correctly blocked
verification.bash_redirect_interception: PASS - redirect > to protected files without workflow now correctly blocked
verification.bash_append_interception: PASS - append >> to protected files without workflow now correctly blocked
verification.excluded_files_handling: PASS - sed -i on excluded files (README.md) correctly allowed
verification.vitest_config_fix: PASS - .cjs test files now properly discovered by vitest
